confidence_rationale: Algorithm reference: BOCPD provides the canonical Bayesian online change-point algorithm with run-length distribution as a principled boundary signal. Substrate-algorithm candidate (a) in Q4. Decisive advantage over threshold-on-PE: BOCPD provides a calibrated probability of boundary, not a thresholded indicator -- which gives MECH-287 a graded broadcast strength rather than binary fire.
failure_signatures: BOCPD assumes parametric model of the segment's data-generating process. If REE's latent streams have heavy-tailed or multimodal distributions not captured by the parametric assumption, BOCPD will report spurious boundaries (false positives) at distribution-edge events.
BOCPD's run-length posterior grows as O(t) per step unless pruned. A substrate that does not implement run-length pruning will scale poorly with episode length.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Online inference of the most recent changepoint in a time series can be performed exactly using a message-passing algorithm that maintains a posterior distribution over the run-length (time since last changepoint), conditional on a parametric model of segment data and a hazard function for changepoint occurrence.
mapping.ree_translation: MECH-288 substrate algorithm candidate (a) BOCPD: maintain a run-length posterior over each watched stream; emit a boundary when posterior probability of run-length=0 exceeds a threshold (or use the posterior mass directly as a graded boundary signal for MECH-287). Provides a principled probabilistic alternative to threshold-on-PE (candidate c) with the same online runtime cost (O(t) per step, prunable).
mapping.mapping_caveat: BOCPD is a generic time-series algorithm with no biological grounding. It is included as the engineering candidate that best mirrors what biology computes when one frames event boundaries as latent change-points (Q4 candidate (a) and (d) hybrid). Biological circuits are not BOCPD; BOCPD is what an engineer would write to capture the same computational role.
mapping.source_context: Cambridge / Princeton machine-learning preprint; standard reference for online Bayesian change-point detection.

confidence_components.notes: Highly cited engineering reference. Mapping fidelity high for the algorithm-design lesson. Transfer risk moderate because BOCPD has no biological grounding -- it is the substrate-engineering candidate, not the biology.
